laws.title: PAMA amendment
laws.chronology_conclusion: The migration report treats this as a statutory note to title 2, and the source text is an amendment instruction rather than a freestanding codification rewrite.
laws.current_xml_comparison: The current branch placement is in title 18 instead of title 2. | The current branch has a placeholder note, but it is attached to the wrong title file.
laws.final_recommended_action: Add the note to title 2 section 1438 without changing operative code text. | Move the note to /us/usc/t2/s1438. | Remove the mislocated title 18 entry.

provisions.text_summary: Amends section 6 of Public Law 19-144 to revise the stated language.
provisions.exact_change: Add the note to title 2 section 1438 without changing operative code text.
provisions.notes: The current branch placement is in title 18 instead of title 2.
